name: AI Video Agent — Cloud-Native (No Local Code)

parameters.content:
## AI Video Agent — Fully Cloud-Native

**No local code, no Docker, no Python.**
Everything runs through n8n + cloud APIs.

### Pipeline:
1. Webhook receives script text
2. OpenAI GPT-4o splits script into scenes + image prompts
3. ElevenLabs generates voiceover audio
4. OpenAI DALL-E 3 generates scene images
5. Shotstack stitches images + audio into video (Ken Burns, transitions)
6. YouTube Data API uploads the final video
7. Notifications via Telegram/Slack/Email

### Required API Keys (set as n8n Credentials):
- OpenAI API Key
- ElevenLabs API Key
- Shotstack API Key (free: shotstack.io)
- Google OAuth2 (YouTube upload)

### Free Tiers:
- Shotstack: Free tier = watermarked renders (remove watermark on paid)
- ElevenLabs: 10K chars/month free
- OpenAI: Pay-as-you-go (~$0.04/image, ~$0.01/1K tokens)
- YouTube API: Free (quota-based)

nodes.name: 1. Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: POST JSON: { "script": "Full voiceover text...", "title": "Video Title", "voice_id": "pNInz6obpgDQGcFmaJgB" }

parameters.content:
### STEP 1: Script → Scenes
GPT-4o analyzes the script and produces:
- Scene descriptions for image prompts
- Timing markers for each segment
- YouTube-ready description & tags

nodes.name: 3. GPT-4o: Script → Scenes
nodes.notes: Credential: Header Auth → Name: 'Authorization', Value: 'Bearer sk-your-key'

nodes.name: 4. Parse Scene JSON
nodes.notes: Extracts the scenes array from GPT response

parameters.content:
### STEP 2: Generate Voiceover
ElevenLabs text-to-speech API
Full script → single MP3 audio file

nodes.name: 5. ElevenLabs: Generate Voiceover
nodes.notes:
Credential: Header Auth → Name: 'xi-api-key', Value: 'your-elevenlabs-key'
Returns binary MP3 audio file.

nodes.name: 6. Upload Audio to Hosting
nodes.notes:
OPTION A: Upload to a file hosting service to get a public URL for Shotstack.
Alternatively, use n8n's built-in 'Write Binary File' + a public-accessible server.
See the setup guide for options (S3, Cloudflare R2, file.io, etc.)

nodes.name: 6. Upload Audio (file.io)
nodes.notes: Uploads voiceover MP3 to file.io (free, temporary hosting) to get a public URL for Shotstack. Response: { "link": "https://file.io/abc123" }

parameters.content:
### STEP 3: Generate Images
DALL-E 3 generates one image per scene.
Loop through scenes array, generate each image, collect URLs.

nodes.name: 7. Split Into Scenes
nodes.notes: Feeds each scene into the DALL-E loop individually

nodes.name: 8. DALL-E 3: Generate Image
nodes.notes: Generates one HD image per scene. DALL-E URLs expire in ~1 hour — Shotstack must render before expiry.

nodes.name: Rate Limit Pause
nodes.notes: DALL-E 3 rate limit: ~5 images/min. 12s pause between calls.

nodes.name: 9. Collect Image Data
nodes.notes: Maps each generated image URL + duration into a unified format for Shotstack

nodes.name: 10. Aggregate All Scenes
nodes.notes: Combines all scene image URLs + durations into a single array for the Shotstack render request

parameters.content:
### STEP 4: Stitch Video (Shotstack)
Shotstack.io cloud API assembles:
- Scene images with Ken Burns zoom effect
- Crossfade transitions between scenes
- Voiceover audio track
- Title overlay on first scene
→ Outputs a rendered MP4 URL

Free tier: watermarked. Paid: $0.05/render.

nodes.name: 11. Shotstack: Render Video
12. Poll Shotstack Status
nodes.notes: Polls render status. States: queued → fetching → rendering → saving → done

nodes.name: Wait 30s (Render)
nodes.notes: Shotstack rendering takes 1-5 minutes typically

parameters.content:
### STEP 5: Upload to YouTube
n8n has a built-in Google YouTube node.
Requires Google OAuth2 credentials with YouTube Data API v3 scope.

nodes.name: 15. Prepare Upload Data
nodes.notes: Collects the rendered video URL + metadata for YouTube upload

nodes.name: 16. Download Rendered Video
nodes.notes: Downloads the MP4 from Shotstack CDN as binary for YouTube upload

nodes.name: 17. YouTube: Upload Video
nodes.notes:
Enable this node after configuring Google OAuth2 credentials.
Requires YouTube Data API v3 scope: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/youtube.upload
Disabled by default — enable when ready.

parameters.content:
### STEP 6: Notifications
Enable whichever channels you use.
All are disabled by default.

parameters.text:
=✅ *AI Video Ready!*

🎬 *{{ $('2. Set Input Parameters').item.json.title }}*
🔗 Video URL: {{ $('12. Poll Shotstack Status').item.json.response.url }}

_Generated entirely in the cloud via n8n_

nodes.name: 18. Notify (Telegram)
nodes.notes: Enable + configure Telegram Bot credentials

nodes.name: 18. Notify (Slack)
nodes.notes: Enable + configure Slack OAuth credentials

parameters.subject: =✅ AI Video Ready: {{ $('2. Set Input Parameters').item.json.title }}
parameters.html:
=

✅ Your AI Video is Ready

Title: {{ $('2. Set Input Parameters').item.json.title }}

Download: Click here


Generated fully in the cloud via n8n — no code, no editing.

nodes.name: 18. Notify (Email)
nodes.notes: Enable + configure SMTP credentials

nodes.name: Notify Failure
nodes.notes: Enable + configure Slack credentials for failure alerts
